title: tengine.telemetry.probe_record v1
description: One probe record from pulse_probe_ring (slot 184). Gated on the TENGINE_PROBE_MASK env var != 0; zero overhead when disabled. Emitted by PulseProbeDrainer (Phase 7). Producer: registry handle PROBE_RECORD in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs. CloudEvents subject is 'frame_{frame}'.

frame.description: GPU frame index at which the probe fired.

probe_id.description: Numeric probe slot id within pulse_probe_ring.

wt_id.description: Work-type id the probe is attached to.

values.description: Probe sample values read from the ring for this record.

probe_label.description: Human-readable label for this probe, as configured via TENGINE_PROBE_MASK.

frame_phase.description: Frame-phase enum value at the time the probe fired.
